title: Spectrumcraft Pack + Fresh Animations
description: A Spectrumcraft Pack compatibility layer with Fresh Animations and Fresh Moves
body:
# Fresh Spectrumcraft
## What it does
This pack provides a compatibility Layer between the [Spectrumcraft Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spectrumcraft-pack), [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) by [FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX) and [Fresh Moves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player) by [TrasTick](https://modrinth.com/user/TrasTick)

This also provides support to the [El Ultimo TV Creeper](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/el-ultimo-tv-creeper) Resource Pack

## Resource Pack order
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VukRlF2Y/images/a815820eb80165176e926aee53ee8751b88763f1.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VukRlF2Y/images/a815820eb80165176e926aee53ee8751b88763f1.png)
## Credits
- [FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX) For creating [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) which are the animations used for the mobs
- [TrasTick](https://modrinth.com/user/TrasTick) For creating [Fresh Moves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player), as I'm using the player_slim and player CEM models to add compatibility with things from the [Spectrumcraft Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spectrumcraft-pack)
